description.value:
Receive Medication prescription 90-miljoen-nummer building blocks for patient G. XXX_Hess
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 7 90 miljoen nummer 90 miljoen nummer
Receive Medication prescription 90-miljoen-nummer resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.

expression.value: Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005' or category.coding.code = '52711000146108').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '90000001')))).count() = 2

Bundle.entry.resource.where($this is MedicationRequest).where(category.coding.code = '33633005' or category.coding.code = '52711000146108').where((((medication.where($this is CodeableConcept).coding | medication.where($this is Reference).resolve().code.coding).exists(code = '90000001')))).count() = 2

description.value: Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '90000001|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.3.11.9999.77.90000000.1.1111' (Eigen artikel: ureumzalf)
